primary_blocker: Flexibility is primary value driver — income is secondary motivation
key_intelligence: SELL profile where flexibility (no sitting tenant, can sell at any time) is the primary value, not income maximisation. The STL income is a welcome bonus. Lead explicitly valued control and exit optionality over revenue ceiling. Pitch must lead with flexibility and short notice period, not income figures.
top_objections: Can I sell the property easily while you're managing it?
What's the notice period if I change my mind?
what_resonated: No sitting tenant = can sell at any time
STL income while waiting for the right buyer
lead_language: What happens if I want to sell?
